header_title.description: Ligama le-app leboniswa ekhanda. I-app yokutfola tincwadzi tekupheka temakhandlela emhlabeni wonke.

header_subtitle.text: Tfolani tincwadzi tekupheka tema emhlabeni wonke
header_subtitle.description: Iteksti lenesihloko leniboniswa ngaphansi kwegama le-app ekhanda.

home_page_hero_title.text: Hlola Tintfo Letimnandzi Tema Mhlaba Wonkhe
home_page_hero_title.description: Isihloko lesikhulu esigabeni se-hero ekhasini lasekhaya.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Buka tincwadzi letitfutfukisiwe letivela emakhishini emhlabeni wonke
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Iteksti lenesihloko leniboniswa ngaphansi kwesihloko se-hero ekhasini lasekhaya.

home_page_featured_title.description: Isihloko sesigaba lesiboniswa phezulu kwegridi yekhadikhadi lelipheka.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Ligama lesikhatsi sekupheka ekhadikhadini lelipheka. {minutes} futsi lifakwa nenombolo yemizuzu.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Ligama lebekwe ngaphambi kweleveli yekubucayi ekhadikhadini lelipheka.

recipe_card_easy.description: Ligama leleveli yekubucayi lekukhombisa incwadzi yekupheka kulula.

recipe_card_medium.description: Ligama leleveli yekubucayi lekukhombisa incwadzi yekupheka lesiphakathi.

recipe_card_hard.description: Ligama leleveli yekubucayi lekukhombisa incwadzi yekupheka lenzima.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Umhluzi lomtfutfukile wemathambo enkukhu nenhloko lenemphilo, iqanda lelitsoftiwe kahle, kanye nematilosi lamasha.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pitsa yekwakha yeNeapolitan ngeletamatisi leSan Marzano, i-mozzarella lemasha, kanye nebasil.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos lenyanyisiwe lenziwe ngepork, iphayinaphu, i-cilantro, kanye nelionji ematortilla e-corn.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Inkukhu lenzima lephakanyisiwe esosini yetamatisi nebhotela lelinemafutha kanye neminongo lenuka kahle.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Imatilosi etiwashiwe ngekushisa ngeletshrimps, tofu, amakinati, kanye nesosisi yetamarind.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Amakrepi lamatsandza, agcwele iNutella, amatamatisi lamasha, kanye nekhrimu lephukile.

locale_switcher_label.description: Ligama lekwenta kube lula kutsi utfole lulwimi lwekushintja ekhanda.
